com.nib.commons.io.Disposition

Packages that use Disposition
Package
Description
com.nib.commons.io
Provides core Input/Output (I/O) components and abstractions for handling various file organizations and access methods.

    Description
    Disposition
    Dd.getDispAbnormal()
    Gets the abnormal termination disposition.
    Disposition
    Dd.getDispNormal()
    Gets the normal termination disposition (KEEP, DELETE, CATLG, UNCATLG, PASS).
    Disposition
    Dd.getDispStatus()
    Gets the initial status disposition (NEW, OLD, SHR, MOD).
